action: Keep all exact price values out of A-0224/A-0225 unless the chart explicitly names provider, model, snapshot date, pricing basis, and cutoff status.
Treat OpenAI rows captured on 2026-05-25 as post-cutoff audit rows unless May 24 corroboration is added.
Do not merge batch, cached-input, long-context, data-sharing, or priority tiers into standard API rows.
reason: Each tier changes the service contract.

action: Show reasoning/test-time compute as an inference-time branch, not as proof that a model thinks like a person.
reason: Reasoning methods spend compute but do not prove faithful cognition.

action: Keep context-window visuals tied to input burden and retrieval/context packing, not product superiority.
reason: Long context is a capability surface whose value depends on task and evaluation.

action: Use margin and marginal-cost language only as blocked or unresolved unless same-scope cost evidence is added.
reason: Public price tables are not cost-accounting ledgers.

action: Decide in final figure list whether A-0224 summarizes or replaces A-0082 through A-0085.
reason: A synthesis board may reduce Chapter 22 figure clutter.

action: Render A-0224 and A-0225 at book trim before final selection because small labels and blocker bands carry the point.
reason: These diagrams rely on readable caveats, not decoration.
